assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddJwtBearer with Authority set to the IdentityServer URL
Program.cs sets MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT Bearer handler
assertions.rationale: The response includes 'options.MapInboundClaims = false;' with a comment explaining it prevents XML URI mapping.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets TokenValidationParameters with NameClaimType = 'name' and RoleClaimType = 'role'
assertions.rationale: The response includes TokenValidationParameters with NameClaimType = "name" and RoleClaimType = "role".

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Audience or ValidAudience to 'catalog-api'
assertions.rationale: The response sets both options.Audience = "catalog-api" and ValidAudience = "catalog-api" in TokenValidationParameters.
The response shows app.UseAuthentication() before app.UseAuthorization() with a comment about ordering.
